title: gonolobus stenosepalus
intro: Gonolobus stenosepalus, also known as the 'Coralberry' or 'Yellow Coral', is a type of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, native to Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Gonolobus stenosepalus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe gastrointestinal issues, making it a sought-after herbal remedy in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, Gonolobus stenosepalus is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
